title: Oxford EasyBook Pastel A4 Stapled Notebook 96 Pages Ruled Assorted Colours Pack of 3
features: RESISTANT COVERS: Long lasting and resistant polypropilene covers which are water-resistant and light for an intensive use
STORAGE: Large capacity 3-flap pocket on the back to store and transport documents

OPTIK PAPER: High quality Optik Paper means you can write on both sides of the page without worrying that the ink will show through. The paper is smooth and white for an easy writing experience. 7mm ruled paper with 2 margins
BOOKMARK: A bookmark flap, located at the end of the notebook, allows you to quickly find your notes and protect them
ORGANISATION: Integrated plastic pocket inside the lid to store important documents, flash cards, or other notes
description: Capture your thoughts in an Oxford Pastel EasyBook. With high quality Optik Paper, stylish pastel colours, and convenient document storage, the EasyBook is ideal for students or professionals to get organised at school, university, or work.

specifications_table.Colour: ‎Assorted: Lavender, Pink, Peach, Light Yellow, Light Green OR Light Blue
